title: FireworkX
description: A simple firework command with many possibilities
body:
FireworkX - The Ultimate Minecraft Firework Experience

FireworkX transforms your Minecraft server with stunningly customizable firework displays. With a simple command, players can launch spectacular fireworks featuring a wide range of effects, shapes, and colors. Whether you're celebrating special events, rewarding players, or simply adding visual flair to your server, FireworkX delivers breathtaking aerial displays that will delight everyone.

Key Features

🎆 Simple Command System

Launch beautiful fireworks with a single command. Just type /firework or /fw and watch as colorful explosions light up the sky! For specific designs, use /firework [preset_name] to choose from your collection of custom firework presets.

⚙️ Fully Customizable Presets

Create unlimited firework designs through the easy-to-use configuration system:

Shape Selection: Choose from all vanilla Minecraft firework types (Ball, Large Ball, Star, Creeper, Burst)

Multiple Colors: Set primary colors and fade colors using standard color names or custom RGB values

Special Effects: Toggle trail and flicker effects for each firework design

Power Control: Adjust flight duration with customizable power levels (1-4)

Multi-Effect Support: Create complex fireworks with multiple explosion effects in a single launch

🔒 Permission System

Control who can launch fireworks with the integrated permission system:

fireworkx.use - Permission to use the /firework command

Easily integrate with your existing permission plugins

🌈 Pre-made Designs

FireworkX comes packed with several ready-to-use firework presets:

Creeper: Green exploding creeper face

Star: Multicolored star burst with trailing effects

Rainbow: Large colorful sphere with every color of the rainbow

Burst: Custom RGB-colored burst pattern with trail effects

Multi: Complex firework with multiple explosion types in one launch


🎯 Random Mode

Can't decide which firework to launch? Use the built-in random mode to surprise yourself with a different firework design each time!

📋 Server-Friendly

FireworkX is designed with performance in mind:

Lightweight implementation with minimal server impact

Compatible with Minecraft 1.20+ servers

Works seamlessly with Spigot, Paper, and Bukkit!

Why Choose FireworkX?

Enhanced Player Experience

Add excitement and visual spectacle to your server without complex setup. FireworkX creates immersive moments that players will remember and share.

Perfect for Events

Ideal for server celebrations, player rewards, special occasions, or just adding fun interactive elements to your gameplay. Use FireworkX for:


Tournament celebrations

Server anniversaries

Player achievement rewards

Holiday events

Welcoming new players


Easy Configuration

No coding knowledge required! The intuitive configuration file makes it simple to create and manage your firework collection. Just edit the YAML file and reload the plugin.

Active Development

FireworkX is actively maintained with regular updates, new features, and responsive support.

Getting Started

Installation is quick and easy:

Drop the plugin JAR file into your server's plugins folder

Restart your server

Edit the config.yml file to customize settings (or use the defaults)

Start launching amazing fireworks with /firework!

Create your own aerial spectacles and illuminate your Minecraft world today with FireworkX!
